title: asplenium shimurae
intro: Asplenium shimurae, also known as Shimura's spleenwort, is a species of fern native to Japan. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion for medicinal purposes, although modern studies have yet to confirm its efficacy.
